title: Post-Quantum Cryptography Initiative
summary: CISA's initiative page on preparing for post-quantum cryptography, with guidance to aid PQC adoption across hardware and software product categories.

title: Post-Quantum Cryptography Standardization Project
summary: NIST's post-quantum cryptography standardization project page, noting that with the first three final PQC standards released, organizations should begin migrating to quantum-resistant cryptography.

title: Post-Quantum Cybersecurity Resources
summary: NSA's resource hub on post-quantum cybersecurity for National Security Systems, including its position that quantum key distribution is not recommended for securing NSS data transmission.

title: Post-Quantum Cryptography
summary: DHS guidance to help organizations prepare for the transition to post-quantum cryptography by identifying, prioritizing, and protecting potentially vulnerable data and systems.

title: Migration to Post-Quantum Cryptography
summary: NCCoE collaborative project on migration to post-quantum cryptography, addressing how to discover quantum-vulnerable public-key algorithms in hardware, software, and services and plan their replacement.

title: Post-Quantum Cryptography: CISA, NIST, and NSA Recommend How to Prepare Now
summary: Joint CISA, NIST, and NSA press release announcing the Quantum-Readiness factsheet, recommending that organizations develop a quantum-readiness roadmap and prepare for implementation of post-quantum cryptographic standards.
